DISCOVERY 302, (*PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 8/9/2022*) PLAINTIFF FRANCISCA HERRERA'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT ROME JONES' FURTHER RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION, SET TWO IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED WITH THE ADDITION THAT THE PARTIES ARE TO MEET AND CONFER TO ARRANGE A CONVENIENT METHOD FOR THE RECOVERY AND PRODUCTION OF THE BANK OF AMERICA RECORDS CONCERNING LEASE PAYMENTS FOR THE MERCEDES BENZ AUTOMOBILE. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN WORD FORMAT VIA EMAIL TO JAMESHFLEMING@GMAIL.COM. (302)
